author.bio: Bringing GitHub to the classroom.   For support, visit https://GitHub.com/support
author.name: GitHub Education

content.text:
What was your first repository? 🤔 
Did it start your open source journey, or was it "test-repo-123"?

Our first repository was 7 years ago 🎂 
To celebrate, we want to hear YOUR stories. 
Use #MyFirstRepo for a chance to win a @GitHub backpack 🎒

https://github.blog/2019-09-17-celebrate-seven-years-of-github-education/
